description.value: You blur the lines between mind and body, reassigning ability damage or drain your target has taken to a corresponding ability score, as per the following table. Physical Ability Score Mental Ability Score Strength Intelligence Dexterity Wisdom Constitution Charisma The transfer of damage can go either wayâyou can convert Intelligence damage to Strength damage and vice versa. You can transfer any number of points of damage or drain in a single casting, though only from one ability score to the corresponding ability score. You cannot transfer enough ability damage or drain to reduce an ability score to 0. Get this book AND support this site!
